title: volutaria boranensis
intro: Volutaria boranensis, also known as Egyptian thistle or Voluminous thistle, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Compositae, characterized by its tall stem and showy yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Volutaria boranensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Volutaria boranensis is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
